mapper.select: SELECT REGION_ID as "regionId", ZDO_CODE as "zdoCode", ZDO_NAME as "zdoName", SIGU_CODE as "siguCode", SIGU_NAME as "siguName", CREATE_DATE as "createDate", LATEST_DATE as "latestDate", MAP_X as "mapX", MAP_Y as "mapY", STATUS as "status" FROM region WHERE STATUS != 'DELETED'
SELECT REGION_ID as regionId, ZDO_NAME as zdoName, SIGU_NAME as siguName, MAP_X as mapX, MAP_Y as mapY FROM REGION WHERE region_id = #{regionId}
